title: Anna University South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Anna University South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Anna University South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Anna University South Asia Partners:
Anna University South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anna University South Asia Partners!
